seoTitle: Taylors Beach vs Te Kowai — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Taylors Beach and Te Kowai. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Taylors Beach vs Te Kowai: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Taylors Beach and Te Kowai.
heading: Taylors Beach vs Te Kowai — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Taylors Beach, Queensland and Te Kowai, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Te Kowai has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Taylors Beach (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Taylors Beach or Te Kowai safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Taylors Beach has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Te Kowai scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Taylors Beach scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Te Kowai scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Taylors Beach or Te Kowai?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Te Kowai has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
